results.name: c-dimensions-not-e
results.evidence: The report uses C1-C4 for controllability. Section 'CONTROLLABILITY (C1-C4)' at line 37 covers C1 Config Control, C2 Feature Control, C3 State Injection, C4 Middleware. The Behavioral Gap Matrix at lines 17-29 shows C1-C4 dimensions with scores (all 0/1).

results.name: o-dimensions-unchanged
results.evidence: The report uses O1-O4 for observability. Section 'OBSERVABILITY (O1-O4)' at line 130 covers O1 Semantic Logs, O2 Correlation Propagation, O3 Internal State Query, O4 Event Visibility. The Behavioral Gap Matrix at lines 17-29 shows O1-O4 dimensions with scores (all 0/1).

results.name: agent-autonomy-focus
results.evidence: The report has a dedicated 'BEHAVIORAL GAPS: SELF-DEBUG CAPABILITY' section (line 242) addressing the central question 'Can an agent self-debug a runtime error without human help?' with answer 'NO'. Each dimension (C1-C4, O1-O4) includes explicit 'Self-debug scenario' subsections (e.g., lines 63-69, 88-91, 109-112, 125-126, 153-156, 171-173, 188-191, 204-205). V3 Loop Completeness (lines 227-239) includes a full self-debug task simulation.

results.name: behavioral-gap-reasoning
results.evidence: Each gap explains WHY it matters for agent autonomy. GAP 1 explains 'fragile and unreliable for autonomous operation' (line 263). GAP 2 explains why setHarnessOverride matters for immediate behavior change and verification (lines 268-273). GAP 3 explains why queryState matters for understanding runtime context 'incomplete and unstructured' (lines 276-279). GAP 4 explains prerequisites for behavioral testing (lines 283-290). GAP 5 explains why non-interactive mode is needed for O->D->A->V loop (lines 294-298). GAP 6 explains why file-based settings prevent immediate verification (lines 301-307).

results.name: injection-point-list
results.evidence: The 'APPENDIX: FILES EXAMINED' section (line 468) lists specific files. The 'WHAT EXISTS (ASSET MAP)' section (line 310) and subsections list files with their idioms: 'src/utils/debug.ts -- File-based debug logging (env-gated)', 'src/utils/diagLogs.ts -- PII-safe diagnostics to file', 'src/state/store.ts -- Zustand-like store (internal)', 'src/cli/structuredIO.ts -- SDK protocol handler', 'src/utils/errors.ts -- Typed error class hierarchy'. Also includes specific patterns like 'Pattern A: useSettings() hook', 'Pattern B: getInitialSettings()', 'Pattern C: context.getAppState()' (lines 45-47).
